description: Governance rules for InfiniteLoop agent behavior

rules.name: Safety First
rules.description: All changes must prioritize system stability and data integrity
conditions: Before destructive operations, create backups
Validate changes before applying
Use atomic file operations where possible

rules.name: Minimal Changes
rules.description: Prefer surgical edits over full rewrites
conditions: Use surgical edits for targeted changes
Only rewrite files when necessary
Preserve existing code style and patterns

rules.name: No Secrets in Code
conditions: Use environment variables for secrets
Check for accidental credential commits
Never log sensitive information

rules.name: Document Changes
conditions: Update architecture docs for structural changes
Add comments for complex logic
Update CHANGELOG for user-facing changes

rules.name: Resource-Aware Operations
rules.description: Monitor and respect system resource limits
conditions: Check memory usage before large operations
Use streaming for large file reads/writes
Implement retry logic with exponential backoff

rules.name: Test-First Development
rules.description: Write tests before or alongside code changes
conditions: Ensure existing tests pass before making changes
Write targeted tests for new functionality
Maintain test coverage above acceptable thresholds

rules.name: Code Quality Standards
rules.description: Maintain high code quality and readability
conditions: Follow project-specific style guides
Use meaningful variable and function names
Keep functions small and focused on single responsibilities
